characters.name: Archibald Kelly
characters.description: Archibald KellyPersonalFull nameArchibald KellyHair ColourLight BrownEye ColourBlue-greyHome townLondonProfessional informationOccupationPolicemanPositionDetective SuperintendentMetropolitan PoliceAffiliationMetropolitan PoliceChief Inspector SullivanBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Blessing of the FatherActorAndrew Tiernan Detective Superintendent Archibald Kellywas a police officer and friend of Chief Inspector Sullivan. Kelly was a veteran police officer, joining the force before 1937. At some point he asked his superiorWalter Sullivanfor tips on a happy marriage. Sullivan revealed that he had kept his wife in the home by binning her university application to become a doctor. Later he became friends with Walter's son Edgar, another police officer.

characters.name: Bonnie Codling
characters.description: Bonnie CodlingPersonalFull nameBonnie CodlingHair ColourBrownEye ColourBlueHome townOxfordFamilyChildrenSandyOther RelativesEstranged fatherProfessional informationAffiliationHambleston Amateur Dramatics SocietyBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Kembleston PlayersActorJordan Baker Bonnie Codlingwas a member of Hambleston Amateur Dramatics Society. Bonnie lived in Oxford. She had a difficult relationship with her father, who she described as a sadist and a bully. When she had a child, Sandy, out of wedlock, he disowned her. She gave up the baby into care. In 1952, she discovered the now adult Sandy had run away toHambleston. She joined HADS in order to get closer to him, but was too ashamed to tell him who she was. She and society founderEmerald Baptistecooked him meals. In 1954 Sandy was shot and Bonnie was in the group of members of HADS who found his body.

characters.name: Brendan Streatham
characters.description: Brendan StreathamBrendan StreathamPersonalFull nameBrendan StreathamHair ColourDark BrownHome townKemblefordFamilyOther RelativesSister-Scarlett StreathamProfessional informationOccupationFarmerPositionMember of Kembleford Parish CouncilAffiliationStreatham FarmKembleford Parish CouncilBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Winds of ChangeActorAsh Hunter Brendan Streathamis a farmer in Kembleford and a member of its parish council. He was born in Kembleford. Despite his farming background, he was opposed to chemical use and harming animals and became a vegetarian. This led to disagreements with his father who disowned him. The family farm went instead to his sister, Scarlett. His father's ashes were scattered on Streatham Meadow.

characters.name: Brendan Streatham
characters.description: Brendan StreathamBrendan StreathamPersonalFull nameBrendan StreathamHair ColourDark BrownHome townKemblefordFamilyOther RelativesSister-Scarlett StreathamProfessional informationOccupationFarmerPositionMember of Kembleford Parish CouncilAffiliationStreatham FarmKembleford Parish CouncilBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Winds of ChangeActorAsh Hunter Brendan Streathamis a farmer in Kembleford and a member of its parish council. The family farm went instead to his sister, Scarlett. His father's ashes were scattered on Streatham Meadow.

characters.name: Bunty Windermere
characters.description: Bunty WindermerePersonalFull namePenelope WindermereDate of Birth1922Height5 10Hair ColourDark brownEye ColourBlueFamilyOther RelativesFather- Richard "Dickie" WindermereAunt-Lady Felicia MontagueGreat Grandfather- The Duke of FromeProfessional informationOccupationTitle-‘Honourable’Behind the scenes informationActorEmer Kenny The Honourable Penelope "Bunty" Windermereis the niece to Lady Felicia Montague. Bunty took over her role in the show from Season 5 to 8. Her first appearance is in"The Labyrinth of the Minotaur", where she flees London after being caught in an affair with a married man.  At the end of the episode, she in sent into the care ofFather BrownandMrs McCarthy. During aninterview, Emer Kenny, who plays Bunty stated that "Bunty will always pick the most exciting, slightly dangerous option, especially if it will annoy her parents. At the same time she has got great morals and a lot of heart, which is what she has found with Father Brown and Mrs M." Kenny also describes Bunty as "really outspoken, brave, and always bold. She can be selfish and will often do the wrong thing, but mostly for the right reasons..." Bunty is very kind and caring, especially to those in need, for example in"The Cat of Mastigatus",  where she comforted May Lewis after May was attacked, and miscarried. Though Bunty needs more time to mature she is confident and a natural charmer, frequently seen flirting, and both going and being asked on dates with multiple men.

characters.name: Canon Fox
characters.description: Canon FoxPersonalFull nameCanon Raymond FoxHair ColourBlackFamilyOther RelativesNephewsJamie (George J Cheeseman)Father Osmond LindseyAt least 2 sistersProfessional informationOccupationRoman Catholic ClergymanPositionCanonAffiliationRoman Catholic ChurchArchdiocese of BirminghamDiocese of CliftonBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Star of JacobThe Two Deaths of Hercule FlambeauThe Celestial ChoirThe New OrderThe Puzzle of BanburismusActorRoger May At least 2 sisters Canon Foxis a member of the Diocese of Clifton. Canon Fox is often annoyed by the Father’s unorthodox and noisy activities. This is seemingly just due to a desire to keep the Catholic Church’s reputation intact and advance himself rather than a specific dislike ofFather Brown.

characters.name: Catherine Glover
characters.description: Catherine GloverPersonalFull nameCatherine GloverDate of Death1955Hair ColourBlackEye ColourBrownProfessional informationOccupationTeacherPositionModern Languages Tutor at St Bernadette's Ladies CollegeAffiliationKembleford Sewing CircleDeathCause of DeathStabbed with compassMurdererJudith SkeltonBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Puzzle of BanburismusActorCarlyss Peer Catherine Gloverwas briefly leader ofKembleford's sewing circle. She was extremely clever, had an eidetic memory and spoke German; however, she had a tendency to become completely fixated on things.  She worked at the communications office withWilliam Fitzgibbonduring the war, decrypting Nazi radio signals. The nature of their work meant they were bound by the Official Secrets Act. In 1952 she moved to Kembleford. She communicated with William, also living in Kembleford, via coded poems.

characters.name: Charles Radler
characters.description: Charles RadlerPersonalFull nameCharles RadlerHair ColourBlackEye ColourBrownProfessional informationAffiliationVincent LazarusBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Cup of CalabriaActorJames Sheldon Charles Radlerwas an associate of Father Vincent Lazarus. Radler was part of Lazarus' plan to auction off the Cup of Calabria at a fake auction in order to put it in the possession ofLydia Adams. They employedRonnie Larkinas an auctioneer. Radler was to be both a fake bidder and a smokescreen for which of them was actually Lazarus.

characters.name: Charlotte Granford
characters.description: Charlotte GranfordPersonalFull nameCharlotte GranfordHair ColourGingerFamilySpouseJasper Granford(dec.)ChildrenSon-Albert 'Bertie' GranfordProfessional informationOccupationClub OwnerAffiliationThe Twister Jazz ClubBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Company of MenActorEmma Davies Charlotte Granfordis the owner of the Twister Jazz Club. She was married to Jasper Granford with whom she had a son, Bertie. When her husband trickedJohn Harrowinto losing the Twister, she helped him run the male only, private members Granford Club that he set up in its place. He kept her mostly in the dark as to his businesses. She was barely allowed into his office and he didn't tell her the combination to the safe.

characters.name: Cormac Thorp
characters.description: Cormac ThorpPersonalFull nameCormac ThorpHair ColourBlackEye ColourBrownFamilyOther RelativesMother- Esther Louise CunninghamFather- Fergus ThorpAunt-Eleanora Jane Heath (née Thorp)Uncle- Augustus HeathPaternal Grandfather- Cormac Thorp IVPaternal Grandmother- Amanda EvansPaternal line Great-Grandfather- Cormac Thorp IIIPaternal line Great-Grandmother- Megan Andrews4xGreat Grandfather- Cormac Thorp IProfessional informationOccupationWarden of Thorp's AlmshousesDeathCause of DeathFall from high roofMurdererGladys CarpenterNora Thorp,Eunice Lytton- AccomplicesBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Deserving PoorActorDaniel Tuite Cormac Thorpwas the warden of Thorp's Almshouses. Cormac was the fifth of that name in his family. The first was the founder of the Almshouses. His running of the almshouses was very strict and he threatened those who pushed back with being thrown out. He made his aunt Nora, another Thorp and a resident, a dogsbody. He also attempted to blackmail Gladys Carpenter by threatening to expose her past life as a prostitute.

characters.name: Emerald Baptiste
characters.description: Emerald BaptistePersonalFull nameEmerald BaptisteDate of Birth23rd JuneHair ColourBrownHome townThe CaribbeanFamilySpouseHusband (deceased)ChildrenA son (deceased)Professional informationPositionFounder of HADS and costume designerAffiliationHambleston Amateur Dramatics SocietyBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Kembleston PlayersActorWendy Mae Brown Emerald Baptistewas the founder of Hambleston Amateur Dramatics Society. Emerald lost her husband and son in the Second World War. In 1948 she travelled to Britain on the HMT Empire Windrush. She founded HADS in order to enrich life in Hambleston. One of the members was Sandy, an orphan who lived in a local barn. Emerald looked after him, cooking him meals along withBonnie Codlingand finding him a job as a delivery boy forTeddy Sadwick. In 1954 Sandy was shot and Emerald was one of the members of HADS who found his body.

characters.name: Eunice Lytton
characters.description: Eunice LyttonPersonalFull nameEunice LyttonHair ColourWhiteEye ColourBlueProfessional informationOccupationPlumberBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Deserving PoorActorAnita Dobson Eunice Lyttonwas a resident of Thorp's Almshouses. Eunice was born to a family that had been considerably wealthy, but frittered away their fortune before it got to her. She was a suffragette and never married. During the war she trained as a plumber. Eunice lived in Kembleford till at least 1954 and was a member of the congregation atSt Mary's. She was a friend ofBrenda Palmer. She spoke French and had arthritis.

Brownis a fictional character created by English novelistG. K. Chesterton, and the main character of theFather Brown(2013) TV series.

characters.name: Felix Livingstone
characters.description: DS Felix LivingstonePersonalFull nameFelix LivingstoneHair ColourBlackEye ColourBrownFamilySpouseVictoria Braithwaite(former girlfriend/fiancée)Other RelativesFather-Jacob LivingstoneHis motherProfessional informationOccupationPolicemanPositionDetective SergeantAffiliationGreater Gloucestershire PoliceGreat Slaughter ConstabularyBermuda Police ForceBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)All episodes ofSister Boniface MysteriesActorJerry Iwu His mother Detective Sergeant Felix Livingstoneis a member ofGreat Slaughter's police force. Felix is somewhat conservative and uptight. Initially he was very confused by the eccentricities of Great Slaughter's natives, particularly the local dialect spoken byTom Thomasand the activities of the nuns. He is a highly diligent policeman always keeping his notebook, but can be somewhat by the book.

characters.name: Franc McCarthy
characters.description: Franc McCarthyPersonalFull nameFrancis McCarthyHair ColourWhiteProfessional informationOccupationSoldier (formerly)MagicianBehind the scenes informationEpisode(s)The Mayor and the MagicianActorFrank Grimes Magician Francis "Franc" McCarthyis the husband ofMrs McCarthy. He left her for another woman, having been MIA, and presumed dead during the war. He turns up inKemblefordworking as a magician and asks Mrs McCarthy to come back to him as he is dying of liver failure. She refuses and he leaves.
